ChatGPT was supposed to hit 1bn weekly active users last year but missed that target

https://t.co/p2aSiHs2VR

I'd like to thank @DatadogHQ's Detection Engineering and Security Advocacy teams for making it possible for me to attend this conference.

kept.text:
Portfolio update after market close of 28-4-26

* = Have current covered calls

1st pic= main port, 2nd=covered calls on that port, 3rd=Roth IRA port

14 holdings

Top 6:
$crdo (more or less 1/4 of port)
$crwd *
$nvda
$app
$rbrk
$meli

Other 8:
$net  *
$ddog *
$amd *
$nu
$se
$zs
$dlo
$now

Sold: 1/5 of $zs 

Note: $now is a swing position that I slowly buy on way down and slowly sell on way up similar to $tsm $alab but my favorite of the 3 is $tsm
